message:
fix: remove duplicate TestCompactTier1_DryRun (PR #2631)

The integration test in compactor_test.go already covers this case with
a real store. The duplicate in compactor_unit_test.go causes build failures
when running with cgo+integration tags.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
